'''âd-ng-l''' ('''kadangal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jargon|jargon]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jargon|jargon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-ng-l
|-
! Lemma
| kadangal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidangal|thidangal]] || [[word:jidangal|jidangal]] || [[word:shidangal|shidangal]] || [[word:kidangal|kidangal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudangal|thuthudangal]] || [[word:jujudangal|jujudangal]] || [[word:shushudangal|shushudangal]] || [[word:kukudangal|kukudangal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudangal|thudangal]] || [[word:judangal|judangal]] || [[word:shudangal|shudangal]] || [[word:kudangal|kudangal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudangal|thudangal]] || [[word:judangal|judangal]] || [[word:shudangal|shudangal]] || [[word:kudangal|kudangal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedangal|thedangal]] || [[word:jedangal|jedangal]] || [[word:shedangal|shedangal]] || [[word:kedangal|kedangal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodangal|thothodangal]] || [[word:jojodangal|jojodangal]] || [[word:shoshodangal|shoshodangal]] || [[word:kokodangal|kokodangal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodangal|thodangal]] || [[word:jodangal|jodangal]] || [[word:shodangal|shodangal]] || [[word:kodangal|kodangal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodangal|thodangal]] || [[word:jodangal|jodangal]] || [[word:shodangal|shodangal]] || [[word:kodangal|kodangal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdangal|thĂŠdangal]] || [[word:jĂŠdangal|jĂŠdangal]] || [[word:shĂŠdangal|shĂŠdangal]] || [[word:kĂŠdangal|kĂŠdangal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadangal|thathadangal]] || [[word:jajadangal|jajadangal]] || [[word:shashadangal|shashadangal]] || [[word:kakadangal|kakadangal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadangal|thadangal]] || [[word:jadangal|jadangal]] || [[word:shadangal|shadangal]] || [[word:kadangal|kadangal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadangal|thadangal]] || [[word:jadangal|jadangal]] || [[word:shadangal|shadangal]] || [[word:kadangal|kadangal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadangal|shadangal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadangal|goshadangal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadangal|gokishadangal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadangalnĂŒ|shadangalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadangalnknĂŒ|goshadangalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadangalnĂŒ|gokishadangalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadangalshĂ«|shadangalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadangalnkshĂ«|goshadangalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadangalshĂ«|gokishadangalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadangalro|shadangalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadangalnkro|goshadangalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadangalro|gokishadangalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadangalmu|shadangalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadangalnkmu|goshadangalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadangalmu|gokishadangalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadangalsher|shadangalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadangalnksher|goshadangalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadangalsher|gokishadangalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadangalng|shadangalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadangalnkng|goshadangalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadangalng|gokishadangalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadangalya|shadangalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadangalnkya|goshadangalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadangalya|gokishadangalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadangalyam|shadangalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadangalnkyam|goshadangalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadangalyam|gokishadangalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadangalnĂŒshĂ«|shadangalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadangalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadangalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadangalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadangalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadangalnĂŒro|shadangalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadangalnknĂŒro|goshadangalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadangalnĂŒro|gokishadangalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadangalnĂŒmu|shadangalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadangalnknĂŒmu|goshadangalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadangalnĂŒmu|gokishadangalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadangalshĂ«nĂŒ|shadangalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadangalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadangalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadangalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadangalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadangalshĂ«ro|shadangalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadangalnkshĂ«ro|goshadangalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadangalshĂ«ro|gokishadangalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadangalshĂ«mu|shadangalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadangalnkshĂ«mu|goshadangalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadangalshĂ«mu|gokishadangalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadangalronĂŒ|shadangalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadangalnkronĂŒ|goshadangalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadangalronĂŒ|gokishadangalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadangalroshĂ«|shadangalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadangalnkroshĂ«|goshadangalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadangalroshĂ«|gokishadangalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadangalromu|shadangalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadangalnkromu|goshadangalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadangalromu|gokishadangalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadangalmunĂŒ|shadangalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadangalnkmunĂŒ|goshadangalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadangalmunĂŒ|gokishadangalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadangalmushĂ«|shadangalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadangalnkmushĂ«|goshadangalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadangalmushĂ«|gokishadangalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadangalmuro|shadangalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadangalnkmuro|goshadangalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadangalmuro|gokishadangalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
